mapper.select:
WITH ids AS (
SELECT TO_NCHAR(REGEXP_SUBSTR(#{item,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, '[^,]+', 1, LEVEL)) AS cid FROM dual CONNECT BY LEVEL <= LENGTH(#{item,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}) - LENGTH(REPLACE(#{item,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, ',', '')) + 1
) SELECT c.id AS cid, c.name_c AS name_c, c.name_e AS name_e, c.shortname AS shortname, c.code AS code, c.unitid AS unitid, c.deptid AS deptid, c.contactid AS contactid, c.contact AS contact, c.tel AS tel, c.period AS period, c.creatorid AS creatorid, c.creattime AS creattime, t.real_name AS creator, u.name AS uname, d.name AS dname, NVL(cq.question_total, 0) AS qcount, NVL(cq.page_total, 0) AS pcount FROM course c JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT cid FROM ids) i ON i.cid = c.id LEFT JOIN unit u ON c.unitid = u.id LEFT JOIN department d ON c.deptid = d.id LEFT JOIN teacher t ON t.id = c.creatorid LEFT JOIN course_ques_page_total cq ON cq.cid = c.id WHERE 1=1
AND c.state = #{state}
AND c.state = 1
AND c.name_c LIKE '%'||#{cname}||'%'
AND c.unitid = #{unitid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
AND c.deptid = #{depid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM course_arrangement ca WHERE ca.cid = c.id AND ca.aid = #{arrangeid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
AND c.creattime >= TO_DATE(#{begindate}, 'yyyy-MM-dd') AND c.creattime < TO_DATE(#{enddate},'yyyy-MM-dd') + 1
ORDER BY NLSSORT(c.name_c,'NLS_SORT=SCHINESE_PINYIN_M') DESC, c.id
ORDER BY NLSSORT(u.name,'NLS_SORT=SCHINESE_PINYIN_M') DESC, c.id
ORDER BY NLSSORT(d.name,'NLS_SORT=SCHINESE_PINYIN_M') DESC, c.id
ORDER BY c.period DESC, c.id
ORDER BY pcount DESC, c.id
ORDER BY qcount DESC, c.id
ORDER BY c.id DESC
ORDER BY NLSSORT(c.name_c,'NLS_SORT=SCHINESE_PINYIN_M') ASC, c.id
ORDER BY NLSSORT(u.name,'NLS_SORT=SCHINESE_PINYIN_M') ASC, c.id
ORDER BY NLSSORT(d.name,'NLS_SORT=SCHINESE_PINYIN_M') ASC, c.id
ORDER BY c.period ASC, c.id
ORDER BY pcount ASC, c.id
ORDER BY qcount ASC, c.id
ORDER BY c.id ASC

SELECT DISTINCT c.ID AS cid, c.name_c AS name_c, c.name_e AS name_e, c.shortname AS shortname, c.code AS code, c.unitid AS unitid, c.deptid AS deptid, c.state AS state, c.contactid AS contactid, c.contact AS contact, c.tel AS tel, c.period AS period, c.creatorid AS creatorid, c.creattime AS creattime, T.REAL_NAME AS creator, U.NAME AS uname, D.NAME AS dname FROM course c LEFT JOIN unit U ON c.unitid = U.ID LEFT JOIN department D ON c.deptid = D.ID LEFT JOIN teacher T ON T.ID = c.creatorid LEFT JOIN course_arrangement ca ON ca.cid = c.ID WHERE 1=1
and c.state = #{state,jdbcType=INTEGER}
and c.state in (2,3,4)
and 1=1
and c.creatorid = #{tid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
and 1=0
and c.name_c like '%'||#{cname}||'%'
and c.unitid = #{unitid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
and ca.aid = #{arrangeid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
and c.deptid = #{depid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
and to_date(#{begindate},'yyyy-MM-dd') <= trunc(c.creattime) and to_date(#{enddate},'yyyy-MM-dd') >= trunc(c.creattime)
order by nlssort(c.name_c,'NLS_SORT=SCHINESE_PINYIN_M') desc
order by nlssort(u.name,'NLS_SORT=SCHINESE_PINYIN_M') desc
order by nlssort(d.name,'NLS_SORT=SCHINESE_PINYIN_M') desc
order by c.state desc
order by nlssort(c.name_c,'NLS_SORT=SCHINESE_PINYIN_M') asc
order by nlssort(u.name,'NLS_SORT=SCHINESE_PINYIN_M') asc
order by nlssort(d.name,'NLS_SORT=SCHINESE_PINYIN_M') asc
order by c.state asc

SELECT DISTINCT c.ID AS cid, c.name_c AS name_c, c.name_e AS name_e, c.shortname AS shortname, c.code AS code, c.unitid AS unitid, c.deptid AS deptid, c.contactid AS contactid, c.contact AS contact, c.tel AS tel, c.period AS period, c.creatorid AS creatorid, c.creattime AS creattime, T.real_name AS creator, U.NAME AS uname, D.NAME AS dname, nvl(cq.question_total,0) AS qcount, nvl(cq.page_total,0) as pcount FROM course c LEFT JOIN unit U ON c.unitid = U.ID LEFT JOIN department D ON c.deptid = D.ID LEFT JOIN course_arrangement ca ON ca.cid = c.ID LEFT JOIN teacher T ON T.ID = c.creatorid LEFT JOIN course_ques_page_total cq ON cq.cid = c.ID WHERE ( EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM teacher_permission tp WHERE tp.cid = c.id AND tp.tid = #{tid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND (tp.pid = '15' or tp.pid = '10') ) OR c.creatorid = #{tid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
and c.name_c like '%'||#{cname}||'%'
and c.unitid = #{unitid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
and ca.aid = #{arrangeid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
and c.deptid = #{depid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
and to_date(#{begindate},'yyyy-MM-dd') <= trunc(c.creattime) and to_date(#{enddate},'yyyy-MM-dd') >= trunc(c.creattime)
order by nlssort(c.name_c,'NLS_SORT=SCHINESE_PINYIN_M') desc
order by nlssort(u.name,'NLS_SORT=SCHINESE_PINYIN_M') desc
order by nlssort(d.name,'NLS_SORT=SCHINESE_PINYIN_M') desc
order by PERIOD desc
order by PCOUNT desc
order by QCOUNT desc
order by nlssort(D.NAME ,'NLS_SORT=SCHINESE_PINYIN_M') desc
order by nlssort(c.name_c,'NLS_SORT=SCHINESE_PINYIN_M') asc
order by nlssort(u.name,'NLS_SORT=SCHINESE_PINYIN_M') asc
order by nlssort(d.name,'NLS_SORT=SCHINESE_PINYIN_M') asc
order by PERIOD asc
order by PCOUNT asc
order by QCOUNT asc
order by nlssort(D.NAME ,'NLS_SORT=SCHINESE_PINYIN_M') asc

select t.*,u.name as uname from (SELECT c.ID AS cid, c.name_c AS name_c, c.unitid as unitid, count(*) AS qcount FROM question_db q, (select * from (
select * from course temp where temp.state=1 and temp.id in (SELECT REGEXP_SUBSTR(#{item,jdbcType=VARCHAR},'[^,]+',1,LEVEL) AS STR FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= LENGTH(#{item,jdbcType=VARCHAR})-LENGTH(REGEXP_REPLACE(#{item,jdbcType=VARCHAR},',','')) + 1)
) ) c WHERE q.state=2 and q.cid=c.id
and c.name_c like '%'||#{cname}||'%'
and c.unitid = #{unitid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
and ca.aid = #{arrangeid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
group by c.id,c.name_c,c.unitid) t left join unit u on t.unitid=u.id
order by nlssort(t.name_c,'NLS_SORT=SCHINESE_PINYIN_M') desc
order by nlssort(u.name,'NLS_SORT=SCHINESE_PINYIN_M') desc
order by QCOUNT desc
order by nlssort(c.name_c,'NLS_SORT=SCHINESE_PINYIN_M') asc
order by nlssort(u.name,'NLS_SORT=SCHINESE_PINYIN_M') asc
order by QCOUNT asc
select distinct q.cid as cid from question_db q where q.state = 2

WITH ids AS (
SELECT TO_NCHAR(REGEXP_SUBSTR(#{item,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, '[^,]+', 1, LEVEL)) AS cid FROM dual CONNECT BY LEVEL <= LENGTH(#{item,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}) - LENGTH(REPLACE(#{item,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, ',', '')) + 1
) SELECT c.id AS cid, c.name_c AS cname FROM course c JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT cid FROM ids) i ON i.cid = c.id WHERE c.state = 1
ORDER BY NLSSORT(c.name_c,'NLS_SORT=SCHINESE_PINYIN_M') DESC, c.id
ORDER BY c.name_e DESC, c.id
ORDER BY c.unitid DESC, c.id
ORDER BY c.period DESC, c.id
ORDER BY NLSSORT(c.name_c,'NLS_SORT=SCHINESE_PINYIN_M') DESC, c.id
ORDER BY NLSSORT(c.name_c,'NLS_SORT=SCHINESE_PINYIN_M') ASC, c.id
ORDER BY c.name_e ASC, c.id
ORDER BY c.unitid ASC, c.id
ORDER BY c.period ASC, c.id
ORDER BY NLSSORT(c.name_c,'NLS_SORT=SCHINESE_PINYIN_M') ASC, c.id

select c.id as cid, c.name_c as cname from course c where c.state = 1
and c.unitid = #{unid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
order by nlssort(c.name_c,'NLS_SORT=SCHINESE_PINYIN_M') desc
order by c.name_e desc
order by c.unitid desc
order by c.period desc
order by nlssort(c.name_c,'NLS_SORT=SCHINESE_PINYIN_M') asc
order by c.name_e asc
order by c.unitid asc
order by c.period asc

select c.id, c.name_c, c.name_e, c.shortname, c.code, c.contact, c.tel, c.creatorid, c.period, c.unitid, c.deptid, c.open, c.state, t1.real_name as creator, to_char(c.creattime,'yyyy-MM--dd hh24:mi:ss') as creattime, t2.real_name as updator, to_char(c.updatime,'yyyy-MM--dd hh24:mi:ss') as updatime, u.name as uname, d.name as deptname from course c left join unit u on u.id=c.unitid left join department d on d.id=c.deptid left join teacher t1 on t1.id=c.creatorid left join teacher t2 on t2.id=c.updatorid where
c.id = #{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
select cc.coid, cc.coname from course_cognition cc where cc.cid = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by cc.coorder
select ca.aid, ca.aname from course_arrangement ca where ca.cid = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by ca.aorder
select cd.did, cd.dname from course_difficulty cd where cd.cid = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by cd.dorder
select ce.etid, ce.etname from course_examtype ce where ce.cid = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by ce.etorder
select ck.kid, ck.kname from course_knowledge ck where ck.cid = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by ck.korder
select cso.soid, cso.soname from course_source cso where cso.cid = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by cso.soorder
select * from course_specialty csp where csp.cid = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by csp.sporder
select csp.spid, nvl(s.name,'') as spname from course_specialty csp,specialty s where s.id=csp.spid and csp.cid = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by csp.sporder
select id, name,torder from theme where cid = #{id,jdbcType=NVARCHAR} and tlevel = 1 and state = 1 order by torder
select ID, NAME from theme where cid = #{id,jdbcType=NVARCHAR} and tlevel = 2 and state = 1 order by torder
select ID, NAME from theme where cid = #{id,jdbcType=NVARCHAR} and tlevel = 3 and state = 1 order by torder
select C01_SEQ.nextval as key from dual
mapper.insert:
insert into arrangement (ID,NAME,AORDER,ISDEFAULT)
select #{item.ID},#{item.NAME},#{item.ID},'0' from dual

insert into examType (ID,NAME,EORDER,ISDEFAULT)
select #{item.ID},#{item.NAME},#{item.ID},'0' from dual

insert into difficulty (ID,NAME,DORDER,ISDEFAULT)
select #{item.ID},#{item.NAME},#{item.ID},'0' from dual

insert into KNOWLEDGE (ID,NAME,KORDER,ISDEFAULT)
select #{item.ID},#{item.NAME},#{item.ID},'0' from dual

insert into cognition (ID,NAME,COORDER,ISDEFAULT)
select #{item.ID},#{item.NAME},#{item.ID},'0' from dual

insert into source (ID,NAME,SORDER,ISDEFAULT)
select #{item.ID},#{item.NAME},#{item.ID},'0' from dual

insert into teacher_permission (tid, cid, pid)
select #{item}, #{cid}, #{pid} from dual

insert into teacher_course (tid, cid, getperbyrole)
select #{item}, #{cid}, #{getperbyrole} from dual
mapper.update:
update course
name_c = #{name_c},
name_e = #{name_e},
shortname = #{shortname},
code = #{code},
unitId = #{unitId},
deptId = #{deptId},
contact = #{contact},
tel = #{tel},
period = #{period},
open = #{open},
updatorid = #{updatorid},
updatime = #{updatime},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
update course c set c.state = #{state} where c.id = #{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
update course c set c.VERIFY_REMARK = #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR} where c.id = #{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.insert:
insert into COURSE_ARRANGEMENT (CID,AID,ANAME)
select #{id} CID,#{item.ID} AID,#{item.NAME} ANAME from dual

insert into COURSE_QUESTIONTYPE (CID, QTID, QTNAME, E_QTNAME, QTDESC, E_QTDESC, ISCON, ATID, SXB, QTORDER, XXDF, MEDIASET)
#{id}, #{item.ID}, #{item.NAME},
#{item.E_QTNAME} '' ,
#{item.QDESC} '' ,
#{item.E_QTDESC} '' , #{item.ISCON}, #{item.ANSWERTYPEID},
#{item.SXB} 0 ,
#{item.QTORDER} #{item.ID} ,
#{item.XXDF, jdbcType=INTEGER} 0 ,
#{item.MEDIASET, jdbcType=INTEGER} 0 ,

insert into COURSE_EXAMTYPE (CID,ETID,ETNAME)
SELECT #{id},#{item.ID},#{item.NAME} FROM dual

insert into COURSE_SPECIALTY (CID,SPID)
select #{id} CID,#{item.ID} SPID from dual

insert into COURSE_DIFFICULTY (CID,DID,DNAME)
select #{id} CID,#{item.ID} DID,#{item.NAME} DNAME from dual

insert into COURSE_KNOWLEDGE (CID,KID,KNAME)
select #{id} CID,#{item.ID} KID,#{item.NAME} KNAME from dual

insert into COURSE_COGNITION (CID,COID,CONAME)
select #{id} CID,#{item.ID} COID,#{item.NAME} CONAME from dual

insert into COURSE_SOURCE (CID,SOID,SONAME)
select #{id} CID,#{item.ID} SOID,#{item.NAME} SONAME from dual
mapper.delete: delete from COURSE_ARRANGEMENT where CID = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
delete from COURSE_QUESTIONTYPE where CID = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
delete from COURSE_EXAMTYPE where CID = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
delete from COURSE_SPECIALTY where CID = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
delete from COURSE_DIFFICULTY where CID = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
delete from COURSE_KNOWLEDGE where CID = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
delete from COURSE_COGNITION where CID = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
delete from COURSE_SOURCE where CID = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
delete from course where id = #{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: select id,name,tlevel from theme where tlevel = #{th_level} and cid = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and pid = #{th_pid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and state = 1 order by torder
SELECT id,name,pid,tlevel,torder,cid FROM theme WHERE cid = #{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND state = 1 ORDER BY torder
mapper.insert: insert into theme (id,name,pid,tlevel,cid,torder) values (#{id}, #{th_name}, #{th_pid}, #{th_level}, #{th_cid}, #{id})
mapper.update: update theme set state = 1 where id = #{thid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
update theme t set t.state = 0 where t.id = #{th_id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.delete: update theme t set t.state = 0 where t.pid = #{th_id,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and t.state = 1
update theme t set t.state = 0 where t.pid in (select t.id from theme t where t.pid = #{th_id,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and t.tlevel = 2) and t.tlevel = 3 and t.state = 1
mapper.select: select qt.qtid as id, qt.qtname as qtname, qt.qtdesc as qtdesc, qt.iscon as iscon, qt.atid as answertypeid, qt.xxdf as xxdf, at.name as atname, qt.mediaset from course_questiontype qt left join answertype at on qt.atid = at.id where qt.cid = #{id} order by qt.qtorder
select * from theme t where t.name = #{name} and t.cid = #{cid} and t.tlevel = #{tlevel} and t.pid = #{pid}
mapper.update: update theme set state = 1 where id = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.insert: insert into theme (name, pid, tlevel, cid) select #{name}, #{pid}, #{tlevel}, #{cid} from dual
mapper.select: select c.name_c from course c where c.state != 0 and c.id = #{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
select c.creator from course c where c.state = 1 and c.id = #{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
SELECT QT01_SEQ.nextval AS ID FROM DUAL
SELECT ar01_SEQ.nextval AS ID FROM DUAL
SELECT ET01_SEQ.nextval AS ID FROM DUAL
SELECT so01_SEQ.nextval AS ID FROM DUAL
SELECT di01_SEQ.nextval AS ID FROM DUAL
SELECT k01_SEQ.nextval AS ID FROM DUAL
SELECT CO01_SEQ.nextval AS ID FROM DUAL
SELECT so01_SEQ.nextval AS ID FROM DUAL

select c.id, c.name_c, c.name_e, c.shortname, c.code, c.contact, c.tel, c.state, c.verify_remark, c.period, c.unitid, c.deptid, c.open, c.creatorid, u.name as unitname, d.name as deptname from course c left join unit u on c.unitid=u.id left join department d on c.deptid=d.id where c.state != 0 and c.id = #{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
select cc.coid as id, cc.coname as name from course_cognition cc where cc.cid = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by cc.coorder
select ca.aid as id, ca.aname as name from course_arrangement ca where ca.cid = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by ca.aorder
select cd.did as id, cd.dname as name from course_difficulty cd where cd.cid = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by cd.dorder
select ce.etid as id, ce.etname as name from course_examtype ce where ce.cid = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by ce.etorder
select ck.kid as id, ck.kname as name from course_knowledge ck where ck.cid = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by ck.korder

select cq.qtid as id, cq.qtname as name,cq.e_qtname, cq.iscon as iscon, cq.atid as answertypeid, cq.qtdesc as qdesc,cq.e_qtdesc,cq.state,cq.sxb,cq.xxdf,cq.mediaset from course_questiontype cq where cq.cid = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by cq.qtorder
select cso.soid as id, cso.soname as name from course_source cso where cso.cid = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by cso.soorder

select csp.spid as id, s.name as name, u.id as unitid, u.name as uname from course_specialty csp left join specialty s on csp.spid = s.id left join unit u on u.id = s.unitid where csp.cid = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by nlssort(s.name, 'NLS_SORT=SCHINESE_PINYIN_M')

select t1.name as t1name, t2.name as t2name, t3.name as t3name from theme t1 left join theme t2 on t1.id = t2.pid and t2.state = 1 left join theme t3 on t2.id = t3.pid and t3.state = 1 where t1.pid = -1 and t1.cid = #{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and t1.state = 1
mapper.insert: insert into course_ques_page_total (id, cid,question_total,page_total) select ctotal001_seq.nextval, #{id},0,0 from dual
mapper.delete: delete from theme t where t.cid = #{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.update: update theme set state = 0 where cid = #{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: select * from (select s.id as id, s.name as name, s.unitid as unitid,u.name as uname from course_specialty cs, specialty s left join unit u on u.id = s.unitid where cs.spid = s.id and cs.cid = #{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} union select s.id as id, s.name as name, n'' as unitid, n'' as uname from specialty s where s.name = '所有专业') t order by nlssort(t.name, 'NLS_SORT=SCHINESE_PINYIN_M')
select * from questiontype qt where qt.isdefault=2

select c.id, c.name_c,c.open from course c where c.id in
#{item,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
select * from course_questiontype cqt where cqt.cid = #{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and cqt.state = 0
select cqt.qtname,cqt.iscon,ast.name from course_questiontype cqt LEFT JOIN ANSWERTYPE ast on ast.id=cqt.atid where cqt.cid = #{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and cqt.state = 0
select * from question_db where cid=#{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and qtid=#{qtid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.update: update question_db q set q.qtid=#{newQtid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where q.cid=#{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and q.qtid=#{originalQtid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.delete: delete course_questiontype where cid=#{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and qtid=#{qtid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.update: update course_questiontype cq set cq.state=1 where cq.cid=#{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and cq.qtid=#{qtid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update course_questiontype
qtname = #{NAME},
e_qtname = #{E_QTNAME},
qtdesc = #{QDESC},
e_qtdesc = #{E_QTDESC},
iscon = #{ISCON},
atid = #{ANSWERTYPEID},
sxb = #{SXB},
state = #{state},
xxdf = #{XXDF},
mediaSet = #{MEDIASET},
where cid=#{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and qtid=#{ID,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: select did,dname from course_difficulty where cid = #{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

select ei.id, ei.ename, ei.cid, ei.cname, ei.begindate, ei.teacherid as tid, t.real_name as teachername, ei.bid, ei.subjectsum, ei.aorb, nvl(ei.scount,0) as scount, ei.time as timeid, ei.score, ei.maxscore, ei.minscore, ei.averagescore, ei.range, ei.stddevscore, ei.xd as xd, ei.xiaodu as xiaodu, ei.nd as nd, ei.qfd as qfd, ei.os as os, ei.pass as pass, ei.skewness, te.name as termname, ei.schoolyear from exampaper_course ec,examinfo ei left join teacher t on t.id=ei.teacherid left join term te on te.id = ei.term where ei.state=6 and ei.id = ec.eid and ec.cid =#{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by ei.begindate desc

select nvl(floor(max((to_date(to_char(se.enddate, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss'), 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') - to_date(to_char(se.begindate, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss'), 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss')) * 24 * 60 * 60)), 0) as usetime from student_exam se where se.enddate is not null and se.eid = #{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
select count(ei.id) as num from examinfo ei,exampaper_course ec where ei.state=6 and ei.id = ec.eid and ec.cid =#{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
select th01_seq.nextval as id from dual

select distinct c.id as cid, c.name_c as name_c, c.name_e as name_e, c.shortname as shortname, c.code as code, c.unitid as unitid, c.deptid as deptid, c.contactid as contactid, c.contact as contact, c.tel as tel, c.period as period, c.creatorid as creatorid, c.creattime as creattime, t.real_name as creator, u.name as uname, d.name as dname, cq.QUESTION_TOTAL as qcount, cq.PAGE_TOTAL as papercount from (select * from (
select * from course temp where temp.state=0 and temp.id in (SELECT REGEXP_SUBSTR(#{item,jdbcType=VARCHAR},'[^,]+',1,LEVEL) AS STR FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= LENGTH(#{item,jdbcType=VARCHAR})-LENGTH(REGEXP_REPLACE(#{item,jdbcType=VARCHAR},',','')) + 1) ) ) c left join unit u on c.unitid = u.id left join department d on c.deptid = d.id left join course_arrangement ca on ca.cid = c.id left join teacher t on t.id=c.creatorid left join COURSE_QUES_PAGE_TOTAL cq on cq.cid=c.id where 1=1
and c.name_c like '%'||#{cname}||'%'
and c.unitid = #{unitid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
and ca.aid = #{arrangeid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
order by c.creattime desc
order by c.name_c desc
order by c.name_e desc
order by c.shortname desc
order by c.code desc
order by c.unitid desc
order by c.deptid desc
order by c.contactid desc
order by c.period desc
order by c.creattime desc
order by c.creatorid desc
order by u.name desc
order by d.name desc
order by c.creattime asc
order by c.name_c asc
order by c.name_e asc
order by c.shortname asc
order by c.code asc
order by c.unitid asc
order by c.deptid asc
order by c.contactid asc
order by c.period asc
order by c.creattime asc
order by c.creatorid asc
order by u.name asc
order by d.name asc
select coid as id, coname as name from course_cognition where cid = #{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
select soid as id, soname as name from course_source where cid = #{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
select kid as id, kname as name from course_knowledge where cid = #{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
select did as id, dname as name from course_difficulty where cid = #{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.insert: insert into course_questiontype (qtid,cid,qtname,iscon,atid,sxb) values (#{qtid},#{cid},#{qtname},#{iscon},#{atid},0)
mapper.select: select * from course c where c.id=#{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and c.creatorid=#{uid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
select * from course c where c.id=#{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

select m.begindate from( select to_number(to_char(ei.begindate,'yyyy'))as begindate from exampaper_course ec,examinfo ei inner join system_time st on ei.time = st.id where ei.state=6 and ei.id = ec.eid and ec.cid = #{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )m group by m.begindate order by m.begindate desc

select to_number(to_char(ei.begindate,'yyyy'))as begindate,ei.averagescore,ei.ename from exampaper_course ec,examinfo ei inner join system_time st on ei.time = st.id where ei.state=6 and ei.id = ec.eid and ec.cid = #{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by ei.begindate desc
mapper.delete: delete from student_exam se where exists(select * from examinfo ei where ei.id=se.eid and ei.cid=#{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
delete from student_answer sa where exists(select * from examinfo ei where ei.id=sa.eid and ei.cid=#{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
delete from student_answer_question sq where exists(select * from examinfo ei where ei.id=sq.eid and ei.cid=#{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
delete from exampaper_answer ea where exists(select * from examinfo ei where ei.id=ea.eid and ei.cid=#{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
delete from exampaper_questiontype eqt where exists(select * from examinfo ei where ei.id=eqt.eid and ei.cid=#{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
delete from exampaper_questionparam eqp where exists(select * from examinfo ei where ei.id=eqp.eid and ei.cid=#{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
delete from exampaper_course ec where exists(select * from examinfo ei where ei.id=ec.eid and ei.cid=#{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
delete from exampaper_question_db eq where exists(select * from examinfo ei where ei.id=eq.eid and ei.cid=#{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
delete from examobject eo where exists(select * from examinfo ei where ei.id=eo.eid and ei.cid=#{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
delete from examinfo ei where ei.cid=#{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
delete from teacher_permission where cid=#{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
delete from answer_db a where exists(select * from question_db q where q.id=a.qid and q.cid=#{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
delete from question_db q where q.cid=#{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

delete from theme t where t.id in( select t1.id from theme t1 where not exists (select * from (select * from exampaper_question_db eq where eq.cid = #{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) temp where temp.theme1id = t1.id or temp.theme2id = t1.id or temp.theme3id = t1.id) and t1.cid = #{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
delete from course_arrangement t where t.cid=#{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
delete from course_cognition t where t.cid=#{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
delete from course_difficulty t where t.cid=#{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
delete from course_examtype t where t.cid=#{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
delete from course_knowledge t where t.cid=#{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
delete from course_questiontype t where t.cid=#{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
delete from course_source t where t.cid=#{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
delete from course_specialty t where t.cid=#{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
delete from course_ques_page_total t where t.cid=#{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
delete from course t where t.id=#{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: select t.id from theme t where not exists (select * from (select * from exampaper_question_db eq where eq.cid = #{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) temp where temp.theme1id = t.id or temp.theme2id = t.id or temp.theme3id = t.id) and t.cid = #{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
select unitid,deptid from course c where c.id=#{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
select a.id as aid, a.content as acontent from answer_db a where a.qid = #{qid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by a.id
mapper.insert: insert into ANSWER_DB(ID, CONTENT, QID, ATID,CONTENT_6,AORDER) select #{aid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{answer_content,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{qid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{answertype,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{answer_content_6,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{index} from dual
mapper.select: select * from course c where c.name_c=#{cname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
select * from course c where c.id=#{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and c.creatorid=#{uid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

WITH ids AS (
SELECT TO_NCHAR(REGEXP_SUBSTR(#{item,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, '[^,]+', 1, LEVEL)) AS cid FROM dual CONNECT BY LEVEL <= LENGTH(#{item,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}) - LENGTH(REPLACE(#{item,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, ',', '')) + 1
), fc AS ( SELECT c.id, c.name_c, c.unitid FROM course c JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT cid FROM ids) i ON i.cid = c.id WHERE c.state = 1
AND c.name_c LIKE '%'||#{cname}||'%'
AND c.unitid = #{unitid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM course_arrangement ca WHERE ca.cid = c.id AND ca.aid = #{arrangeid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
) SELECT t.*, u.name AS uname FROM ( SELECT c.id AS cid, c.name_c AS name_c, c.unitid AS unitid, COUNT(q.id) AS qcount FROM fc c JOIN question_db q ON q.cid = c.id WHERE q.state IN (0,1) AND q.ismain = 0
AND q.addtime >= TO_DATE(#{bdate}, 'yyyy-MM-dd') AND q.addtime < TO_DATE(#{edate}, 'yyyy-MM-dd') + 1
GROUP BY c.id, c.name_c, c.unitid ) t LEFT JOIN unit u ON t.unitid = u.id
ORDER BY NLSSORT(t.name_c,'NLS_SORT=SCHINESE_PINYIN_M') DESC, t.cid
ORDER BY NLSSORT(u.name,'NLS_SORT=SCHINESE_PINYIN_M') DESC, t.cid
ORDER BY t.qcount DESC, t.cid
ORDER BY t.cid DESC
ORDER BY NLSSORT(t.name_c,'NLS_SORT=SCHINESE_PINYIN_M') ASC, t.cid
ORDER BY NLSSORT(u.name,'NLS_SORT=SCHINESE_PINYIN_M') ASC, t.cid
ORDER BY t.qcount ASC, t.cid
ORDER BY t.cid ASC

select code,name_c as cname from course where id in
#{id,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}
